## What does this PR do?

<!-- Short description of the change -->

## Type of change
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] refactor — code change (no feature/fix)
- [ ] style — formatting, no logic change
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — build, deps, config
- [ ] ci — CI/CD changes

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run build` passes with 0 errors
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] New Supabase tables have RLS enabled + policies
- [ ] Realtime subscriptions are cleaned up in useEffect return
- [ ] setInterval/setTimeout are cleaned up on unmount
- [ ] Mobile layout tested (or N/A)
- [ ] OG tags verified if new page added (or N/A)
